page_metadata.biotools__summary: SwissRegulon is a database of genome-wide annotations of regulatory sites. It contains annotations for 17 prokaryotes and 3 eukaryotes. The database frontend offers an intuitive interface showing genomic information in a clear and comprehensible graphical form.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: SwissRegulon is a database of genome-wide annotations of regulatory sites. It contains annotations for 17 prokaryotes and 3 eukaryotes. The database frontend offers an intuitive interface showing genomic information in a clear and comprehensible graphical form.
